top_signals.title: New anime adapted for stage expands what 2.5D theater can be
top_signals.summary: "Gachiakuta," a new, award-winning anime adapted for the stage, dazzled with dynamic multilevel fight and dance choreography with cues from martial arts and breakdance.

top_signals.title: Biotech takeover target Abivax sinks over 37% as cancer cases cloud trial data for bowel disease drug
top_signals.summary: A clinical trial update wiped out billions in the French company's market cap and raised questions over a potential takeover.

top_signals.title: FS KKR Sells $900 Million Bonds in Rare Junk-Rated BDC Deal
top_signals.summary: A private credit fund jointly managed by Future Standard and KKR & Co. sold $900 million of junk bonds on Monday, according to people familiar with the matter, in a rare high-yield offering by a publicly traded credit fund.

top_signals.title: Barclays Pushes UK to Be More Welcoming to Foreign Investment
top_signals.summary: Barclays Plc urged the UK to do more to attract a broader range of foreign investment and help add trillions of pounds more capital from overseas.

top_signals.title: Army vet supports her Navy sister in tough hospital journey
top_signals.summary: When Navy fire controlman aegis Kayla Saska needed support during a hospital stay, her Army veteran sister Patricia Rowledge rushed to Bethesda, Maryland.

top_signals.title: Galaxy Digital opens OTC prediction market trading for institutions, kicks off with $10 million Kalshi trade
top_signals.summary: Galaxy Digital launches institutional OTC prediction markets trading, executing a $10M Clarity Act trade with Arca on Kalshi at launch.
